title: task
description: Rust lichen-schc has codec.rs, fragment.rs, rules.rs but is missing headers and context modules that Python has (headers.py ~526 lines, context.py ~95 lines). These handle IPv6/UDP header compression rules and compression context state.
notes: Implemented headers.rs and context.rs - equivalent Rust implementations of Python SCHC header compression modules
close_reason: Implemented headers.rs (~580 lines) and context.rs (~170 lines) in lichen-schc. 5 packet profiles, rule matching, no_std compatible. 34 tests pass.
